channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 14
item.description: Mother remembers road ranger killed on I-75, over $2 million in cocaine seized in Pinellas County and hot weather with few showers.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lakeland Electric explains what's behind higher summer power bills
item.description: Some customers say their monthly bills have jumped by more than $100 this summer, prompting a wave of complaints on social media.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump administration highlights NATO allies' progress in defense spending pledge
item.description: NATO allies are spending more on defense after the Ankara summit. Here's what it means for Ukraine and the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa property rezoning: Land tract near historic cemeteries sparks unmarked grave concerns
item.description: A fierce debate is brewing over a 1.5-acre land tract on North Boulevard that sits among historic cemeteries and could contain unmarked graves. The Hillsborough County Planning Commission began reviewing a residential rezoning request this week that preservation advocates strongly oppose.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Bradenton police release video of weekend 'teen takeover' on Riverwalk
item.description: Bradenton police broke up a ‘teen takeover’ involving up to 300 young people near the Riverwalk on Saturday.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Nathan Benderson Park expansion targets year-round use with new indoor facility

[WFLA News Channel 8] House passes bill to make daylight saving time permanent
item.description: The House on Tuesday passed with broad bipartisan support legislation that would make daylight saving time permanent nationwide. The lower chamber voted 308-117 for the Sunshine Protection Act of 2025, which would make daylight saving time the permanent standard time. Twenty-two Republicans and 95 Democrats voted against the measure. The legislation now heads to the [...]

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] World Cup 2026: Spain makes final, what to know for England-Argentina
item.description: Here's what to know for Wednesday's game.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] St. Pete secures $2 million for Shore Acres drainage improvements
item.description: The City of St. Pete just secured $2 million in state funding to build a pump station and improve the drainage system in Shore Acres.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Car slams into Social Security Administration building in New Port Richey: FHP
item.description: A parking attempt escalated quickly in New Port Richey on Tuesday, when a car smashed into the Social Security Administration located at 7601 Little Road.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Spain advances to World Cup final with 2-0 win over France
item.description: Spain advanced to its first World Cup final since winning in 2010 with a 2-0 victory over France on Tuesday.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Sarasota Bradenton International Airport expands into global aviation hub
item.description: The once sleepy airport in Sarasota is rapidly transforming into a global aviation hub as international aerospace manufacturers build assembly lines and bring new aircraft to the United States.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Mega Millions jackpot $637 million tonight. See winning lottery numbers
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida officials delay domestic terror label on Muslim group

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] State economists: Property tax amendment could cost Florida local governments $11.8 billion annually
item.description: Florida’s proposed property tax amendment could eventually reduce local government revenue by nearly $12 billion a year, according to a new analysis from the state’s Revenue Estimating Conference.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] $2.1 million in seized cocaine after 'Hall of Fame' drug bust in Pinellas: PCSO
item.description: Pinellas County Sheriff Bob Gualtieri announced Tuesday the seizing of more than $2.1 million in cocaine.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US reinstates Iranian blockade in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing strikes
item.description: The U.S. has reinstated an Iranian blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, with 20+ Navy warships now in the region as strikes against Iran continue to threaten a fragile ceasefire.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Crystal River man charged after dead puppies found inside home
item.description: Deputies investigating a welfare check in Crystal River found dead puppies inside a home filled with odors of decay, feces, and ammonia, leading to felony animal cruelty charges.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Energy companies offer programs to help residents save on summer cooling costs
item.description: Clearwater residents helped by Duke Energy Tuesday as they connected neighbors to an energy saving program, that's as residents say they're taking a proactive approach to keep cool on a budget.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man struck and killed by truck after fleeing ICE agents in Florida
item.description: A 28-year-old man died in Florida Tuesday after he was struck by a semi trailer truck. The man was fleeing from U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, according to state officials.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'He wanted to protect people': Mother remembers Road Ranger killed on I-75
item.description: Investigators say DUI manslaughter suspect had a recent drunk driving arrest and was involved in a hit-and-run earlier the same day.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Busch Gardens Tampa Bay coaster 'Kumba' to close in August after 33 years
item.description: Busch Gardens Tampa Bay announced on July 14 it will be closing its oldest standing roller coaster, Kumba.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Subaru issues recall for 541,000 SUVs over label with incorrect weight rating
item.description: Subaru of America is recalling more than 541,000 of its Crosstrek, Forester, and Ascent SUVs due to an inaccurate label attached to the vehicles.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Busch Gardens Tampa Bay retiring Kumba roller coaster after 33 years
item.description: Busch Gardens Tampa Bay announced that award-winning coaster, "Kumba," will take its final ride next month as the theme park unveils its new "Kumba's Revenge."

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Tampa airport installs flood barrier infrastructure to protect airfield power during hurricanes
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Anonymous witness claims he was drugged, raped in trial of Florida lawmaker accused of sexual harassment
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Appeals for Florida death row inmates can go on for years. Here's why
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] A guide to the 2026 Pensacola Beach Air Show from parking to weather
[The Florida Channel] 7/13/26 Capitol Update Extended – Attorney General James Uthmeier Begins Investigation of Potassium Bromate
item.description: 7/13/26 Capitol Update Extended – Attorney General James Uthmeier Begins Investigation of Potassium Bromate first appeared on The Florida Channel Attorney General James Uthmeier announced that his office would be investigating companies using potassium bromate throughout the state. Potassium bromate is a chemical compound used to keep bread fresh. Attorney General Uthmeier says the compound has be

item.title: [Pinellas County Sheriff] Sheriff Bob Gualtieri Holds Press Conference to Discuss “Operation Hall of Fame” (26-066) On July 14, 2026, Sheriff Bob Gualtieri and FDLE Tampa Bay Regional Operations Center Special Agent in Charge, Mark Dubina, held a press conference to discuss a large narcotics investigation called “Operation Hall of Fame.”
